title: Over-Under Intervals
description: Lactate tolerance and clearance at threshold
purpose: Lactate tolerance and clearance at threshold

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 105%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 105% FTP for 2:00. 85-95 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 105% for 2:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 12 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 2:00 at 90%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 90% for 2:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 15 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 17% through session. Block 1/3. You've done 4min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 105% for 2:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 14 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 20% complete. Block 1/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/3. 20% complete. Hold 90% steady. 62 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 2:00 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 2:00 at 90%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 14 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 2:00 at 105%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 105% at 85-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 22% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 105% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 12 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 10min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25% complete. Block 1/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 58 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 8:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 30 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/3. 105% at 70-80 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 2/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% into session. Seated at 70-80 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 46 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 32 minutes in. 90% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 10 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 42% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 44 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 34 minutes in. 105% at 70-80 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 42% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 9 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 42% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 42 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 36 minutes in. 90% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 8 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 40 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 38 minutes in. 105% at 70-80 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 7 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 38 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 40 minutes in. 90% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 52% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 8:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 62% complete. Block 3/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 24min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 90-100 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5 blocks to go. 28 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 50 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 62% into session. Seated at 90-100 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 3/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 4 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 65% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 26min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 26 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65% complete. 90% for 2:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 54 minutes of threshold work done. Block 3/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 3/3. 67% complete. Hold 105% steady. 24 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 54 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 67% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 54 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 3/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2 blocks left. 22 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 56 minutes in. 90% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% complete. Block 3/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. 2 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 72% through. 105% at 90-100 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 32min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 58 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 72% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. 20 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 2:00 at 90%. Then 18min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 90-90% FTP, 85-95 rpm. After this: 18min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 18min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 2:00 at 90%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 90% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 77% done. 0 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 36min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62 minutes of work done. 10 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 8:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 70 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 87% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 87% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
